title: Redacted
description: The unlikeliest of friends JT Spak and Jason Pelling come together for the 2nd Brighton Fringe Show JT Spak has cerebral pulsy and an absolutely savage sense of humour, Some very dark material in here documenting his life with severe cerebral pulsy, This could be triggering for some people so proceed with care, His portion of the show will be captioned with an overhead projector, JT is a star in the making having experienced his show 2 years ago, I can confirm it is very funny and very dark. Jason Pelling is a more a cockney geezer type and couldn't be more different from JT, Stories from his haphazard life, As a geezer in Brighton, A real lovable rogue.
